Subject: Meeting Tomorrow at 2 PM
Body: Hi team, just confirming our meeting tomorrow at 2 PM in Conference Room A. See you then!

Subject: ALERT: Unusual Activity Detected
Body: We noticed unusual access patterns from a location you don't normally use. Confirm this was you by clicking here. Your account security depends on it.
